columns.extraction_plan: The trial reports on "time to worsening of disease-related physical symptoms as measured by the Functional Assessment of Cancer Therapy-Prostate (National Comprehensive Cancer Network) symptom index 17-item questionnaire". This is a measure of quality of life. Extract the sentence "time to worsening of disease-related physical symptoms as measured by the Functional Assessment of Cancer Therapy-Prostate (National Comprehensive Cancer Network) symptom index 17-item questionnaire" from the "Study Assessments" section.
